name: Fresh Cherry Crostata Jb
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 sticks (6 oz) cold unsalted butter, cut into 1/4-inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix 2 cups of flour with 1 tablespoon sugar and salt. Add the cold butter and cut it in briefly using a pastry blender.
2. Add the water and stir just until the dough begins to come together.
3. Gather up the dough and transfer it to a lightly floured surface. Knead briefly until it forms a smooth, cohesive mass.
4. Pat the dough into a disk, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before rolling out.
5. Mix the almonds with the remaining 1 tablespoon flour and 1 tablespoon sugar.
6. Preheat the oven to 400°F. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the dough to a 15-inch round; transfer to a baking sheet.
7. Sprinkle the almond mixture all over the dough, leaving at least 1-1/2 inches from the edge. Arrange the cherries on top.
8. Fold the edge of the dough up and over the fruit. Brush the melted butter over the pastry border and sprinkle the remaining 2 tablespoons sugar over the whole crostata.
9. Bake for 50 minutes to 1 hour, or until the crostata is deeply browned. Let cool on a rack for 10 minutes.
10. Dip a brush into the crostata and glaze the cherries with some of their juices. Serve warm.
